lemon_market_new_listings.description: The vehicle is in fair condition. The exterior has visible scratches and several small dents. The interior shows wear and some staining on the upholstery. All mechanical and electronic components are functional.
This vehicle is in mint condition. The engine and transmission function as new. The exterior has no scratches, dents, or paint chips. The interior is in original condition with no visible wear.

Experience automotive perfection with this stunning vehicle in truly mint condition! It has been meticulously cared for and looks absolutely showroom-ready inside and out. If you're looking for a car that feels and drives like it just left the dealership, this is the one for you!

This vehicle is in exceptional, mint condition, appearing exactly as it did the day it rolled off the showroom floor. The exterior paint is flawless, with no scratches, dents, or chips, and retains a deep, factory-fresh shine. Inside, the cabin is immaculate; the leather seats show no wear, and every electronic component and feature functions perfectly. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, having been meticulously maintained with a full service history and stored in a climate-controlled environment. It drives smoothly and powerfully, offering the performance and reliability of a brand-new vehicle. This is a rare find for a collector or a discerning buyer who demands perfection.

This vehicle is in poor condition and will require significant mechanical and cosmetic attention to be roadworthy. The exterior shows its age with several noticeable dents, some surface rust along the door sills, and significant paint oxidation on the hood and roof. Inside, the upholstery has multiple tears, and the electronics are inconsistent, including a non-functional radio and faulty power windows. While the car does start and drive, the engine has a persistent knocking sound and the transmission slips when shifting into higher gears. This is being sold strictly as-is and would be best suited for a parts donor or a dedicated project for an experienced mechanic.
Poor condition.

Presenting a vehicle of superlative caliber, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This specimen exhibits an immaculate aesthetic profile, completely free from any discernible wear or blemish. Mechanically, it operates with the precision of a factory-new machine, having undergone a rigorous multi-point inspection to ensure its peerless status. For the discerning driver who demands nothing short of perfection, this offering represents an unparalleled opportunity to acquire a vehicle in pristine, showroom condition.

Hey there! You seriously have to see this beauty. It’s in absolutely pristine condition—honestly, it looks and smells like it just left the showroom floor! I’ve taken such good care of it, it’s basically been pampered since day one. If you’re looking for a ride that’s as close to brand new as you can get, this is the one for you. Can't wait for you to take it for a spin!

This collector-grade E46 M3 features the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six, delivering linear power through six individual throttle bodies and a high-revving 8,000 RPM redline. This specimen boasts a flawless mechanical pedigree with the critical rod bearing service and VANOS overhaul already completed. The chassis remains rigid with proactive subframe reinforcement, paired with a precision-tuned suspension utilizing Bilstein PSS10 dampers. Power is delivered via a Getrag 6-speed manual gearbox to a variable M-differential lock. The exterior is finished in Alpine White with original factory-spec clear coat, while the interior retains its factory-fresh tactile feel and N
Mint condition. Single owner. Full service history included. Garage kept. No accidents or mechanical issues. Original paint. Interior looks new.

Step into what can only be described as a time capsule. This vehicle is in absolute showroom condition, preserved meticulously by a single owner in a climate-controlled environment since day one. The exterior boasts a deep, glass-like luster with zero imperfections—no rock chips, no swirl marks, and certainly no door dings. Inside, the cabin retains its original factory scent; the premium leather seats are supple and free of any creases, while the high-tech interface and buttons remain crisp and untouched. Mechanically, it performs exactly as it did the day it rolled off the assembly line. Every service has been performed ahead of schedule at the authorized dealership, with a full portfolio of maintenance records included. From the pristine engine bay to the untouched undercarriage, this car represents the pinnacle of its class. It is a turn-key masterpiece ready for a discerning collector or an enthusiast who accepts nothing less than perfection.

We are pleased to present this exceptional vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This specimen remains in showroom condition, exhibiting no discernible wear and reflecting a history of meticulous care. Every mechanical and aesthetic detail has been preserved to ensure an unrivaled driving experience for the discerning collector. This is a rare opportunity to acquire a vehicle of such pristine caliber.

Presented in showroom condition, this vehicle exemplifies automotive excellence. Every aspect of this specimen has been meticulously preserved, offering an uncompromising driving experience for the most discerning enthusiast. This is a rare opportunity to acquire a vehicle of unparalleled caliber and pristine presentation.

Hey there! You seriously won't find another one like this. It’s been my absolute pride and joy, kept in a climate-controlled garage and hand-washed every single weekend. It looks and smells like it just rolled off the showroom floor—truly flawless inside and out. I'm only letting it go because I'm downsizing, so here’s your chance to grab a perfect ride! Come take a look, you're going to love it!

This E46 M3 is a collector-grade specimen featuring the legendary S54 inline-six engine, delivering linear power through six individual throttle bodies and an 8,000 RPM redline. Mechanically impeccable, it has undergone comprehensive preventative maintenance including a Vanos overhaul, rod bearing replacement, and rear subframe reinforcement to ensure chassis rigidity. The Getrag 6-speed manual transmission offers crisp, short-throw engagement, paired with a perfectly calibrated limited-slip differential for optimal torque vectoring. The exterior retains its factory-original luster with zero paint correction required, while the interior remains in showroom state, free of bolster wear or pixel degradation. A meticulously documented, turn-key investment for the purist seeking peak BMW M-division engineering.
Pristine condition. Single owner. Garage kept. No accidents. Full service records available. Inspection welcome.

Presenting an absolute jewel for the discerning collector: a vehicle that truly embodies 'showroom quality' in every sense. The exterior is finished in a flawless, deep-gloss coat with a mirror-like reflection, entirely free of stone chips, swirl marks, or blemishes. It has been meticulously garage-kept and climate-controlled since its first mile. Inside, the cabin is a time capsule; the premium leather remains supple and matte, devoid of any creasing or wear, and the interior still retains its original new-car scent. Every technological feature, from the high-fidelity audio system to the intricate driver-assist suite, operates with precision. Mechanically, this car is beyond reproach, boasting a documented history of preventative maintenance performed exclusively by master technicians using genuine parts. The engine bay is as pristine as the day it rolled off the assembly line. This sale includes all original keys, the window sticker, and a comprehensive binder of service records. If you are looking for a vehicle that looks, feels, and drives exactly as it did on the showroom floor, this is the one.

Presented for your consideration is a vehicle of exceptional caliber, maintained to an impeccable standard that mirrors its original showroom delivery. This specimen exhibits no discernible wear, representing the zenith of its class in both aesthetic preservation and mechanical integrity. An uncompromising choice for the discerning driver who demands nothing short of perfection.

We are privileged to present this peerless automotive specimen, maintained to an uncompromising standard that transcends typical market offerings. This vehicle stands in impeccable, showroom-grade condition, exhibiting a level of preservation rarely seen outside of private collections. Every detail, from the flawless finish to the precision-tuned mechanical assembly, reflects a history of meticulous stewardship and climate-controlled storage. For the discerning individual who demands an investment-grade asset without compromise, this offering represents the definitive benchmark of its class.

Hey there! I’m parting ways with my absolute pride and joy. This beauty is in truly mint condition—it looks and drives like it just rolled off the lot! I've babied this car since day one, and it's looking for a new home where it'll be just as loved. You won't find a scratch on it! Come take it for a spin; you’re going to love how it feels on the road! ✨

This E46 M3 is a superlative example featuring the legendary S54 naturally aspirated inline-six, delivering linear power through six individual throttle bodies. Recent preventative maintenance includes a comprehensive VANOS overhaul and rod bearing replacement with VAC coated bearings for long-term reliability. The chassis is impeccably preserved with reinforced rear subframe mounts, ensuring structural integrity under high lateral loads. The Getrag 420G 6-speed manual transmission provides tactile engagement, paired with a factory limited-slip differential that maintains exceptional exit traction. Draped in Carbon Black Metallic with an unblemished Nappa leather interior, this vehicle exhibits zero paint correction requirements and remains in showroom-grade mechanical and aesthetic condition.
Pristine condition. Single owner. No accidents. Garage kept. Full service history. Runs perfectly.

Presenting a truly exceptional example of automotive preservation. This vehicle remains in showroom condition, having been meticulously maintained in a climate-controlled garage since day one. The exterior features a deep, mirror-like finish protected by a professional-grade ceramic coating, completely free of rock chips, swirls, or surface imperfections. Inside, the cabin is in a factory-fresh state; the premium leather upholstery shows zero wear, and the original carpets have been protected by custom mats from the start. Mechanically, the car is flawless, supported by a comprehensive service history exclusively performed at authorized dealerships. Every electronic component, sensor, and luxury feature functions exactly as it did the day it rolled off the assembly line. This is a rare opportunity for a discerning collector to acquire a vehicle that looks, feels, and drives as if it were brand new.

Presenting an automotive specimen of unparalleled caliber. This vehicle has been curated to maintain an impeccable standard, exhibiting a showroom-quality finish and flawless mechanical performance. Every detail reflects a commitment to preservation, offering a driving experience indistinguishable from its original debut. This is a rare opportunity to acquire a vehicle in truly pristine, investment-grade condition.

Presenting an automotive specimen of unparalleled distinction. This vehicle remains in impeccable, showroom condition, having been preserved with fastidious attention to detail. Every surface, mechanical component, and electronic system operates at the highest standard of excellence. For the discerning enthusiast who demands nothing short of perfection, this offering represents a rare opportunity to acquire a truly pristine example of engineering mastery.

Hey there! I’m honestly so sad to let this beauty go, but it’s time for someone else to enjoy it! This car is in absolutely incredible shape—it’s been babied since day one and looks like it just rolled off the showroom floor. You won’t find a single scratch or dent anywhere; it's truly been kept in pristine, showroom condition. It drives like a total dream and is ready for its next big adventure. Come take a look, you’re going to love it!

Mint condition. Single owner. Garage kept. Clean title. No accidents. Maintenance records available.

This vehicle is a true collector-grade masterpiece, meticulously preserved in a climate-controlled environment and presented in absolute showroom state. The exterior features a deep, mirror-like finish completely free of stone chips, swirl marks, or imperfections, while the factory alloy wheels remain pristine without a hint of curb rash. Inside, the cabin is a time capsule; the premium leather upholstery retains its original scent and firm bolsters, showing no signs of wear or creasing. Every electronic component, from the high-fidelity sound system to the advanced climate control, functions with crisp precision. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, boasting a documented full-service history and a smooth, powerful engine that performs exactly as it did on day one. This is a rare opportunity to acquire a turn-key, flawless example of automotive excellence for the most discerning buyer.

Presenting an automotive specimen of unparalleled caliber. This vehicle remains in pristine, showroom condition, reflecting a standard of care that satisfies the most exacting requirements. Every detail, from the flawless exterior finish to the meticulously preserved interior, confirms its status as a premier investment for the discerning driver who demands excellence without compromise.
